## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Clarissa Castanha's experience and potential fit for an operations role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is transitioning from an agency model to a tech company, building AI workflows for content production](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Clarissa has relevant experience from Rock Content, where she streamlined operations in a similar agency-to-tech transition](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [GrowthX's use of AI technology sets it apart from Clarissa's previous experience, potentially offering better scalability](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Next steps include a follow-up interview with Jason and a take-home assignment to assess Clarissa's approach to the role](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2776.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Transition

  - [Currently operates like an agency, delivering content and SEO services to customers](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Building AI workflows behind the scenes to increase content production capacity](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Goal: Transition to a tech company with a platform for customers to access workflows](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Two-sided product interaction:](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
    1.  Customer-facing: Delivered content and outcomes
    2.  Internal: Team using AI workflows to produce content efficiently

### Clarissa's Experience at Rock Content

  - [Joined to help transition from services to tech-focused business](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Revamped operations and GTM strategy](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Streamlined team structure from 3 levels (strategist, managing editor, freelancer) to 2 (strategist, freelancer)](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Increased workload for remaining team members](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [Balancing strategic work with operational tasks](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Lack of robust technology support](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

### Operational Improvements and Challenges

  - [Implemented master tracker using spreadsheets to monitor projects and KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Attempted to revamp HubSpot operations for better cross-team connectivity](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Struggled with manual processes and human-dependent analyses](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)
  - [Monthly review meetings to ensure adherence to processes and standards](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)

### GrowthX's Current State and Future Plans

  - [AI workflows currently used internally by writers and SEO strategists](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)
  - [Considering standalone products from existing workflows (e.g., fact-checker, competitive research)](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [Near-term goal: Create a customer-facing platform to showcase work and results](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [Long-term potential: Transition to a SaaS model with customer-operated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to review the interview recording with a colleague](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)
  - [Clarissa to be informed about moving forward in the process today](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2776.0)
  - [Next interview to be scheduled with Jason](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
  - [Take-home assignment to be given, focusing on Clarissa's approach to the role](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Work around Clarissa's upcoming work trip to schedule further interviews](https://fathom.video/share/b8ER7y8XQFDiMUwQ8-xStdQQttj4te7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2834.0)
